meta.notes: All timestamps are local to timeZone; stage/stream/workout times use MM-dd HH:mm:ss format anchored at 2026-04-05 (Asia/Shanghai). Consecutive same-stage sleep intervals are merged. Vitals are summarized per session with min/avg/max/p50/p90 and per-stage averages; oxygenSaturation is percent. Streams are tuples ordered by tupleSchema with hoisted unit/source; dense streams carry downsampledTo and are avg/min/max bins (verbose exports keep full resolution). Activity daily summaries use local-time day buckets with source-deduplicated sums (matches the Health app; overlapping iPhone/Watch samples are not double-counted); distance is in kilometres. additional.* sections report one row per day; their aggregation map says whether each metric is a daily sum, average of readings, or the day's latest reading.
